languages.text: Архмилитант Ведка Дунавски погибла одной из последних среди экипажа флагмана, сражаясь стойко и отчаянно, как настоящая дочь Заркова. Последнее, что воительница видела перед смертью — далекие звезды, что так манили ее к себе, и человека, которого она считала спасителем своего родного мира.

Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski was one of the last of the flagship's crew to die, fighting steadfastly and desperately, like a true daughter of Zarkov. The last thing the warrior saw before death was the distant stars that beckoned to her, and the person she considered the saviour of her homeworld.
languages.original_text: Архмилитант Ведка Дунавски погибла одной из последних среди экипажа флагмана, сражаясь стойко и отчаянно, как настоящая дочь Заркова. Последнее, что воительница видела перед смертью — далекие звезды, что так манили ее к себе, и человека, которого она считала спасителем своего родного мира.

traits.locale_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski was one of the last of the flagship's crew to die, fighting steadfastly and desperately, like a true daughter of Zarkov. The last thing the warrior saw before death was the distant stars that beckoned to her, and the person she considered the saviour of her homeworld.

Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski was one of the last of the flagship's crew to die, fighting steadfastly and desperately, like a true daughter of Zarkov. The last thing the warrior saw before death was the distant stars that beckoned to her, and the person she considered the saviour of her homeworld.

Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski was one of the last of the flagship's crew to die, fighting steadfastly and desperately, like a true daughter of Zarkov. The last thing the warrior saw before death was the distant stars that beckoned to her, and the person she considered the saviour of her homeworld.

languages.text: 旗艦の乗組員の中で最後の生き残りとなったヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキは、真のザルコフの娘のように、最後まで戦い抜いた。死の直前、彼女は遠くの星々を望み、そして彼女の故郷を救ったと信じる人物を見つめた。
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski was one of the last of the flagship's crew to die, fighting steadfastly and desperately, like a true daughter of Zarkov. The last thing the warrior saw before death was the distant stars that beckoned to her, and the person she considered the saviour of her homeworld.

traits.locale_text: 旗艦の乗組員の中で最後の生き残りとなったヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキは、真のザルコフの娘のように、最後まで戦い抜いた。死の直前、彼女は遠くの星々を望み、そして彼女の故郷を救ったと信じる人物を見つめた。

languages.text: 首席战士薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡是旗舰最后一批离世的老船员。她一直坚定且绝望地战斗着，不愧为扎尔科夫之女。临终前，她看到的最后景象，是远方召唤她的群星，以及那位被她视作母星救世主的人。
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski was one of the last of the flagship's crew to die, fighting steadfastly and desperately, like a true daughter of Zarkov. The last thing the warrior saw before death was the distant stars that beckoned to her, and the person she considered the saviour of her homeworld.

traits.locale_text: 首席战士薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡是旗舰最后一批离世的老船员。她一直坚定且绝望地战斗着，不愧为扎尔科夫之女。临终前，她看到的最后景象，是远方召唤她的群星，以及那位被她视作母星救世主的人。

languages.text: L'archimilitante Vedka Dunawski fut l'une des dernières à mourir parmi les membres de l'équipage du vaisseau amiral. En véritable fille de Zarkov, elle livra un combat acharné jusqu'à ce qu'elle finisse par succomber. Elle périt ainsi parmi les étoiles lointaines qui l'avaient toujours attirée, aux côtés de la personne qu'elle considérait comme {mf|le sauveur|la sauveuse} de son monde.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski was one of the last of the flagship's crew to die, fighting steadfastly and desperately, like a true daughter of Zarkov. The last thing the warrior saw before death was the distant stars that beckoned to her, and the person she considered the saviour of her homeworld.

traits.locale_text: L'archimilitante Vedka Dunawski fut l'une des dernières à mourir parmi les membres de l'équipage du vaisseau amiral. En véritable fille de Zarkov, elle livra un combat acharné jusqu'à ce qu'elle finisse par succomber. Elle périt ainsi parmi les étoiles lointaines qui l'avaient toujours attirée, aux côtés de la personne qu'elle considérait comme {mf|le sauveur|la sauveuse} de son monde.

languages.text: La Archimilitante Vedka Dunawski fue una de las últimas miembros de la tripulación de la nave insignia en morir en una lucha implacable y desesperada, como una verdadera hija de Zarkov. Lo último que vio la guerrera antes de su muerte fueron las estrellas distantes que la llamaban y la persona a la que consideraba la salvadora de su mundo.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski was one of the last of the flagship's crew to die, fighting steadfastly and desperately, like a true daughter of Zarkov. The last thing the warrior saw before death was the distant stars that beckoned to her, and the person she considered the saviour of her homeworld.

traits.locale_text: La Archimilitante Vedka Dunawski fue una de las últimas miembros de la tripulación de la nave insignia en morir en una lucha implacable y desesperada, como una verdadera hija de Zarkov. Lo último que vio la guerrera antes de su muerte fueron las estrellas distantes que la llamaban y la persona a la que consideraba la salvadora de su mundo.

languages.text: Başmilitan Vedka Dunawski, Zarkov'un gerçek bir kızı gibi kararlılıkla ve umutsuzca savaşarak sancak gemisinin mürettebatı içinde ölen son kişilerden biri oldu. Savaşçının ölümünden önce gördüğü son şey, onu çağıran uzak yıldızlar ve yurdunun kurtarıcısı olarak gördüğü kişiydi.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski was one of the last of the flagship's crew to die, fighting steadfastly and desperately, like a true daughter of Zarkov. The last thing the warrior saw before death was the distant stars that beckoned to her, and the person she considered the saviour of her homeworld.

traits.locale_text: Başmilitan Vedka Dunawski, Zarkov'un gerçek bir kızı gibi kararlılıkla ve umutsuzca savaşarak sancak gemisinin mürettebatı içinde ölen son kişilerden biri oldu. Savaşçının ölümünden önce gördüğü son şey, onu çağıran uzak yıldızlar ve yurdunun kurtarıcısı olarak gördüğü kişiydi.

languages.text: Erzmilitantin Vedka Dunawski war eine der letzten Gefallenen des Flaggschiffs, nachdem sie standhaft und verzweifelt wie eine wahre Tochter von Zarkov gekämpft hatte. Das Letzte, was die Kriegerin vor ihrem Tod sah, war der Ruf der fernen Sterne und {mf|der vermeintliche Retter|die vermeintliche Retterin} ihrer Heimatwelt.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski was one of the last of the flagship's crew to die, fighting steadfastly and desperately, like a true daughter of Zarkov. The last thing the warrior saw before death was the distant stars that beckoned to her, and the person she considered the saviour of her homeworld.

traits.locale_text: Erzmilitantin Vedka Dunawski war eine der letzten Gefallenen des Flaggschiffs, nachdem sie standhaft und verzweifelt wie eine wahre Tochter von Zarkov gekämpft hatte. Das Letzte, was die Kriegerin vor ihrem Tod sah, war der Ruf der fernen Sterne und {mf|der vermeintliche Retter|die vermeintliche Retterin} ihrer Heimatwelt.
